name: Ganache Hearts with Raspberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. To make ganache: Place cream in a pan and heat until it just starts to boil. Stir in chocolate and butter until smooth and melted. Add confectioner's sugar, stir well.
2. Refrigerate the ganache mixture for about 30 minutes until slightly firm.
3. Using a pastry bag fitted with a star tip, pipe the ganache onto a baking sheet lined with wax paper. Alternatively, spoon and spread the mixture into heart shapes. Allow to refrigerate or freeze until firm.
4. Meanwhile, place frozen raspberries and sugar in a quart-sized bowl. Cook until the mixture begins to boil. Stir together cornstarch and cold water, then add this mixture to the berries along with lemon juice.
5. Continue cooking until slightly thickened. Strain through a fine mesh sieve and discard seeds. Refrigerate until chilled.
6. Before serving, thin the sauce with a small amount of water to achieve the desired consistency.
7. To serve, pour a thin layer of raspberry sauce onto a small plate. Carefully place the ganache hearts in the center.
